Week 1 (Now - Apr 12)
- Write problem statement
- Define threat model
- Create architecture diagram
- Download dataset
- Submit proposal
- Explore dataset

Week 2 (Apr 13 - Apr 19)
- Build data loading script
- Identify behavioral features
- Implement preprocessing

Week 3 (Apr 20 - Apr 26)
- Implement feature extraction
- Train Isolation Forest
- Generate anomaly alerts

Week 4 (Apr 27 - May 3)
- Evaluate results
- Tune model
- Prepare demo
- Write final report
- Package reproducibility files
